records.ety: [L. indigenus, indigena, fr. OL. indu (fr. in in) + the root of L. gignere to beget, bear. See In, and Gender.]

defs: Native; produced, growing, or living, naturally in a country or climate; not exotic; not imported.
quotes: Negroes were all transported from Africa and are not indigenous or proper natives of America.
In America, cotton, being indigenous, is cheap.
Joy and hope are emotions indigenous to the human mind.
